records.ety: [L. indulgens, -entis, p. pr. of indulgere: cf. F. indulgent. See Indulge.]

defs: Prone to indulge; yielding to the wishes, humor, or appetites of those under one's care; compliant; not opposing or restraining; tolerant; mild; favorable; not severe; as, an indulgent parent.
quotes: The feeble old, indulgent of their ease.
